workItem.author: marius-patrik
workItem.title: DarkFactory Autoreview
workItem.body: Resolve the complete stable issue-review finding set without losing owner decisions.
comments: Preserve the owner-authored history and re-fetch the exact issue version before mutation.

policy.branching: One worker = one issue = one branch = one PR; branch df/<issue>-<slug> from dev.
policy.enforcement: All merges require green validation and Autoreview; never force-push or bypass gates.

facts: The issue version and complete finding identifiers were re-fetched from the trusted control plane.
